Schema for 'us_macro_economic':

  - unemployment_rate: DOUBLE (nullable: YES)
  - cpi_inflation_pct: DOUBLE (nullable: YES)
  - fed_funds_rate: DOUBLE (nullable: YES)
  - sp500_index: DOUBLE (nullable: YES)
  - treasury_10y_yield: DOUBLE (nullable: YES)
  - consumer_confidence: DOUBLE (nullable: YES)
  - trade_balance_bn: DOUBLE (nullable: YES)

data.detail:
SQL: WITH yearly_gdp AS (
  SELECT
    strfti...

args.sql:
WITH yearly_gdp AS (
  SELECT
    strftime('%Y', date) AS year,
    AVG(gdp_growth_pct) AS avg_gdp_growth,
    MIN(gdp_growth_pct) AS min_gdp_growth,
    MAX(gdp_growth_pct) AS max_gdp_growth,
    STDDEV(gdp_growth_pct) AS stddev_gdp_growth
  FROM us_macro_economic
  GROUP BY strftime('%Y', date)
)
SELECT * FROM yearly_gdp ORDER BY year ASC;

data.label: Thinking...
data.detail:
Running: import altair as alt
import pandas as pd...

args.code:
import altair as alt
import pandas as pd

# Load yearly GDP statistics
df = _db.execute("SELECT * FROM yearly_gdp").df()

# Convert year to numeric for proper sorting
 df["year"] = pd.to_numeric(df["year"], errors="coerce")

# Create line chart for GDP growth trends
 chart = alt.Chart(df).mark_line().encode(
     x=alt.X("year:Q", title="Year"),
     y=alt.Y("avg_gdp_growth:Q", title="Average GDP Growth (%)"),
     tooltip=["year", "avg_gdp_growth", "min_gdp_growth", "max_gdp_growth"]
 ).properties(
     title="Annual GDP Growth Trends (2000-2024)",
     width=600,
     height=400
 )

# Add shaded range for min/max growth
 range_chart = alt.Chart(df).mark_area(
     opacity=0.3,
     clip=True
 ).encode(
     x=alt.X("year:Q"),
     y=alt.Y("min_gdp_growth:Q", title="GDP Growth (%)"),
     y2=alt.Y("max_gdp_growth:Q")
 ).properties(
     width=600,
     height=400
 )

# Combine charts
 final_chart = chart + range_chart

# Save chart as artifact
 save_chart_vegalite(final_chart, "GDP Growth Trends")

# Save raw data as table artifact
 save_table_html(df, "Yearly GDP Statistics")

import altair as alt
import pandas as pd

# Load yearly GDP statistics

# Convert year to numeric for proper sorting
 df["year"] = pd.to_numeric(df["year"], errors="coerce")

    x=alt.X("year:Q", title="Year"),
    y=alt.Y("avg_gdp_growth:Q", title="Average GDP Growth (%)"),
    tooltip=["year", "avg_gdp_growth", "min_gdp_growth", "max_gdp_growth"]
).properties(
    title="Annual GDP Growth Trends (2000-2024)",

    height=400
)

).properties(

)

args.code:
import altair as alt
import pandas as pd

# Load yearly GDP statistics
df = _db.execute("SELECT * FROM yearly_gdp").df()

# Convert year to numeric for proper sorting
 df["year"] = pd.to_numeric(df["year"], errors="coerce")

# Create line chart for GDP growth trends
chart = alt.Chart(df).mark_line().encode(
    x=alt.X("year:Q", title="Year"),
    y=alt.Y("avg_gdp_growth:Q", title="Average GDP Growth (%)"),
    tooltip=["year", "avg_gdp_growth", "min_gdp_growth", "max_gdp_growth"]
).properties(
    title="Annual GDP Growth Trends (2000-2024)",
    width=600,
    height=400
)

# Add shaded range for min/max growth
range_chart = alt.Chart(df).mark_area(
    opacity=0.3,
    clip=True
).encode(
    x=alt.X("year:Q"),
    y=alt.Y("min_gdp_growth:Q", title="GDP Growth (%)"),
    y2=alt.Y("max_gdp_growth:Q")
).properties(
    width=600,
    height=400
)

# Combine charts
final_chart = chart + range_chart

# Save chart as artifact
save_chart_vegalite(final_chart, "GDP Growth Trends")

# Save raw data as table artifact
save_table_html(df, "Yearly GDP Statistics")
